candidate_definition_hints.text: A desktop app that lets you use your AI subscriptions (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, GitHub Copilot) with any coding tool. Wraps CLIProxyAPI with a clean UI for managing connections and tracking usage.
Use your AI subscriptions (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, GitHub Copilot) with any coding tool. Native desktop app wrapping [CLIProxyAPI](https://github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI).
